ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)
Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification

ingredients_text: Marshmallow (53%) (glucose fructose syrup, sugar, water, dextrose, gelatin, corn starch, honey, ground vanilla bean, acidity regulator (lactic acid)), milk chocolate (35%) (sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, cocoa mass, emulsifier (soya lecithin), natural flavour (vanilla)), dark caramel (12%) (sugar, cream (milk), glucose syrup, butter oil (milk), cocoa powder, cocoa mass, cocoa butter, fleur de sel, emulsifier (sunflower lecithin)). milk chocolate contains cocoa solids 35% minimum and milk solids 22% minimum.
product_name: Baru, Marshmallows Milk Chocolate, Dark Caramel
